system.notes: Anti-chemical nanite injection (Firestorm: Shockwave): +4 to Body Type saves vs. drugs and gases, 40% chance of avoiding nerve toxin damage altogether; lifespan about five minutes (the dose timer tracks ~100 turns). Keep the item equipped while a dose runs so the save engines see the protection; it also dismantles all internal foreign chemicals (instant-sober).

mechConsumable.note: +4 saves vs drugs/gases; 40% negate nerve toxin
